name: configure_animator_controller
description: Modifies an existing AnimatorController: adds or removes states, parameters, and transitions. Operates on Layer 0 (base layer).

path.description: Asset path of the existing .controller file, e.g. 'Assets/Animations/Player.controller'.

state_name.description: Name of the state to add/remove, or the SOURCE state for add_transition.

target_state.description: Name of the DESTINATION state for add_transition.

parameter_name.description: Name of the parameter to add or remove.

parameter_type.description: Type of the parameter (for add_parameter). Default: Float.

condition_parameter.description: Parameter name to use as a transition condition (for add_transition).

condition_mode.description: Condition comparison mode (for add_transition with a condition_parameter).

has_exit_time.description: Whether the transition uses exit time (default false, recommended for game transitions).
